# Result figures

Curated figures embedded in the project [`README`](../../README.md). Two kinds:

### Illustrative (already committed)

- `spatial_representation.png` — one cross seen as raw tracking → positional entropy →
  attack-minus-defense entropy → pitch control. Built from the feature modules in
  [`../../xcross/features`](../../xcross/features) (`entropy.py`, `pitch_control.py`,
  `frames.py`) on a single processed match.

### Generated by the report (copy after running the pipeline)

The full set of result charts is produced into — and committed under —
`artifacts/reports/figures/`. This folder keeps the curated subset the README embeds (the
report writes ranking charts once per target, `_success` / `_shot`; the README shows both).
After re-running the report, refresh the embedded ones:

```bash
uv run python -m xcross.model.report
cp artifacts/reports/figures/chart_tradeoff.png docs/figures/
cp artifacts/reports/figures/chart_ranking_top_{success,shot}.png docs/figures/
cp artifacts/reports/figures/chart_ranking_quadrants_{success,shot}.png docs/figures/
cp artifacts/reports/figures/calibration_{xcross,xcrossot}_success.png docs/figures/
cp artifacts/reports/figures/lift_{xcross,xcrossot}_success.png docs/figures/
cp artifacts/reports/figures/chart_importance_{xcross,xcrossot}_success.png docs/figures/
cp artifacts/reports/figures/chart_by_{league,position}_success.png docs/figures/
cp artifacts/reports/figures/chart_stability_vs_n_success.png docs/figures/
cp artifacts/reports/figures/chart_reliability_success.png docs/figures/   # paper-comparison.md
cp artifacts/reports/figures/chart_ablation_success.png docs/figures/      # paper-comparison.md
```

Keep this folder a small, stable snapshot — not every figure the report produces. The full
set and the meaning of each figure are documented in [`metrics.md`](../metrics.md).
